aboutPage.title: A cleaner way to explore amusement parks
aboutPage.lead: AmusementPark maps parks, attractions and practical information with a stable architecture ready for future comparison and distance features.

stats.parksHint: Built to remain fast at scale

mission.title: Find the right park faster
mission.subtitle: The product starts with a solid portfolio, then grows toward richer discovery and decision tools.

discover.title: Reliable park pages
discover.text: Each park page centralizes location, items, photos, nearby parks and useful references.

explore.title: A map-first mindset
explore.text: Search, map interactions and nearby distances are designed as reusable foundations.

enjoy.title: A coherent visual identity
enjoy.text: Public, auth and profile pages now share the same tokens, surfaces and components.

clean.title: Built to evolve step by step
clean.text: The project is designed to add maps, comparisons and trip planning without disrupting the visitor experience.
